title: physalis angulata var. villosa
intro: Physalis angulata var. villosa, also known as Japanese ground cherry or villose jaltomata, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Physalis angulata var. villosa can be prepared into teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
